description: Replace bun run with npm run in e2e-test plugin check script and remove dead bun.lock gitignore entry
qualityChecks: cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Replace bun run with npm run and remove bun.lock gitignore
userStories.description: As a plugin developer, I want the e2e-test plugin to use npm run in its check script and not reference bun in its gitignore
acceptanceCriteria: plugins/e2e-test/package.json check script uses 'npm run' instead of 'bun run' (4 replacements)
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run build passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run type-check passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run lint passes
cd plugins/e2e-test && npm run format:check passes
userStories.notes:
Two files, both trivial edits:

1. plugins/e2e-test/package.json line 37: Change the check script from:
   "check": "bun run build && bun run type-check && bun run lint && bun run format:check"
   to:
   "check": "npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check"

2. plugins/e2e-test/.gitignore line 4: Remove the 'bun.lock' line entirely. The file should end with just:
   dist/
   node_modules/
   *.tsbuildinfo
